affected_pattern: NULL fields appear only for subscribers whose names contain extended Unicode characters
root_cause: Schema evolution defect — the Avro schema registry upgraded to a stricter decoder that rejected surrogate-pair Unicode in the 'subscriber_name' field, causing the entire billing record to be dropped mid-pipeline.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Schema Evolution Rejection pattern
Avro registry changelog documents stricter UTF-8 validation
All failed billing records share non-ASCII subscriber-name bytes
recommended_action: Update Avro decoder to normalize surrogate pairs, not reject
Replay the dropped billing records through the fixed decoder
Add a per-field validation metric distinguishing drop vs quarantine
Expand test fixtures to cover Unicode edge cases for every billing record field
